name: Beef Ziti Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can (16 oz.) DelMonte cut green beans, drained
1 can (11 oz.) Green Giant Niblets, drained
2 cans (10 3/4 oz.) Campbell's condensed golden mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Cook ziti according to package directions; drain.
3. Return cooked ziti and vegetables (green beans and corn) to cooking pot used to cook ziti.
4. Meanwhile, in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat, cook beef until browned, stirring to separate meat; drain fat.
5. Stir in soup, tomatoes, basil, pepper, and garlic to meat. Heat thoroughly.
6. Add soup mixture to ziti mixture; mix well.
7. Spoon into greased 13 x 9 inch baking dish. Cover with foil.
8. Bake for 15 minutes.
9. Uncover; sprinkle with cheese. Bake 5 more minutes or until cheese melts.
